prompt: Create a dramatic vertical football tribute poster in a monochrome royal-blue palette for Cruzeiro. Show 2 male footballers layered in the foreground, both wearing blue Cruzeiro home jerseys from different eras. The front player is larger, centered slightly right, shown from the waist up in a dynamic running pose with his right index finger raised, muscular build, serious triumphant expression, modern blue jersey with white shoulder stripes, white sponsor logos, and the club's white stars crest on the chest. The back player is slightly smaller, positioned left and behind, also in motion, wearing a vintage blue jersey with a retro white collar and a classic soda sponsor logo, evoking an earlier era of the club. Their faces should be generic and not identifiable. In the background, place a huge circular Cruzeiro crest centered behind them, a packed stadium crowd with blue lighting, and exactly 2 waving flags: one in the upper left with the club badge, and one in the upper right with large supporter text. Add atmospheric smoke, vignette shadows, and layered light effects for a heroic, celebratory sports-design look. Include exactly 4 Portuguese text elements integrated into the composition: on the left, "O INÍCIO DE UM FENÔMENO" in stylized white lettering; on the right, "O MAIOR DE TODOS" with a small crown icon; across the lower center in very large white brush-script, FENÔMENO; and at the very bottom in spaced uppercase text, ONTEM UM SONHO. HOJE UMA LENDA. with the last word highlighted in brighter blue. Add a handwritten signature under the main headline with the number 9. Use high-contrast sports poster compositing, gritty texture, sharp jersey fabric detail, dramatic rim lighting, and an epic fan-culture mood suitable for a club legend celebration.
